dimensions.name: Early growth signal
dimensions.prompt: Has this company recently raised funding, been acquired by PE, shown rapid headcount growth, or announced geographic expansion?

dimensions.name: Leadership gap
dimensions.prompt: Is the CPO or COO role vacant, recently departed, or held by a founder with no product background?

dimensions.name: No product discipline
dimensions.prompt: Is there evidence of an engineering-led product culture, absence of a product function, or customer complaints about product direction?

dimensions.name: Scale pressure
dimensions.prompt: Is there investor timeline pressure, churn risk, or competitive threat requiring a product transformation?

dimensions.name: Hiring history signal
dimensions.prompt: Manual input from LinkedIn check - has this company attempted to fill a senior product role in the last 12 months?

dimensions.name: Tech specialisation
dimensions.prompt: Does this firm specialise in technology leadership placement?

dimensions.name: Market fit
dimensions.prompt: Is this firm active in relevant European markets?

dimensions.name: Network signal
dimensions.prompt: Manual input - is this firm known to you, is there a warm connection?

dimensions.name: Activity recency
dimensions.prompt: Has this firm placed a CPO/CTO/VP Product role in the last 12 months?
